title: Height
text: Height Height of the panel button, in character cells. Description You can specify the size of the buttons in character positions. If you leave the Height and Width fields blank, Uniface makes all panel buttons the size of the button with the most characters (the longest) in the current definitions. In session panels, this property is ignored on Microsoft Windows because the buttons are scaled to fit whatever is specified for the buttons setting in the [screen] section of the application's initialization file. Applies To Panels Related Links [screen] The [screen] section of the initialization file defines the fonts used in the GUI user interface and additional settings for screen display.
